title: Aagaya Sooriyanai Lyrics Samurai
stanzas:
Aagaaya sooriyanai
ottrai sadaiyil kattiyaval
nindraadum vinmeenai
netri suttiyil ottiyaval.
ival thaane erimalai alli
marudhaani pol poosiyaval

kodi naan un dhegam muttrum
suttri konda kodi naan.
en enna edhuvo.

kilithaan unai konjam
konjam koththi thinnum
kilithaan unai
konjum ennamo.

Aagaaya sooriyanai
ottrai sadaiyil kattiyaval
nindraadum vinmeenai
netri suttiyil ottiyaval.
neethaane erimalai alli
marudhaani pol poosiyaval

adiye en dhegam mutrum
sutri konda kodiye
un ennam ennavo.

sagiye enai konjam
konjam  koththi thinnum kiliye
ennai kollum ennamo.

kadhal pandhyil naame
unavuthaan unnum porule
unnai unnum vindhai ingaethaan.

kadhal paarvaiyil boomi veruthaan
margazhi verkkum
chiththirai kulirum
maaruthal ingaethaan.

un kulirukku idhamaai
enai adikkadi koluthu
en veyilukku sugamthaan
un vervaiyil nianithu

kadhal marandhavan
kaamam kadanthavan
thuravai thuranthadhum
sorgam vanthathu.

Aagaaya sooriyanai
ottrai sadaiyil kattiyaval
nindraadum vinmeenai
netri suttiyil ottiyaval.
neethaane erimalai alli
marudhaani pol poosiyaval

ennai kandathum
yaen nee oligiraai
dora bora malai sendraalum
thurathi varuvene.

unnai neenginaal engae selvathu
un  ullangaiyil regai kulle
olindhu kolvene.

adi kadhal vandhum
yaen kannaamoochi.
nee kandu kandu pidithaal
pin kaaman aatchi.

kaththi parithu nee
poovai thinikkiraai
baaram kuraindhathil
yaedho nimmadhi.

Aagaaya sooriyanai
ottrai sadaiyil kattiyaval
nindraadum vinmeenai
netri suttiyil ottiyaval.
ival thaane erimalai alli
marudhaani pol poosiyaval

adiye en dhegam mutrum
sutri konda kodiye
un ennam ennavo.

sagiye enai konjam
konjam  koththi thinnum kiliye
ennai kollum ennamo.

enrichedMetadata.high_ctr_intro: Experience the enchanting melody of Aagaya Sooriyanai from the movie Samurai. This harmonious duet, brought to life by the soulful voices of Harini and Harish Ragavendra, is a testament to the lyrical brilliance of Vairamuthu and the musical genius of Harris Jeyaraj. Dive into this romantic masterpiece that continues to resonate with Tamil music lovers.
stanzaMeanings: The title of the song is 'Aagaya Sooriyanai' from the movie 'Samurai'.
She tied the sky's sun in her single braid and adorned her forehead with a shining star. She is the one who applied henna like the fiery mountain.
I am the flag that encircled your body completely. What is this feeling?
The parrot pecks at you little by little, the parrot does something to you.
She tied the sky's sun in her single braid and adorned her forehead with a shining star. You are the one who applied henna like the fiery mountain.
Oh dear, you are the flag that encircled my body completely. What is your thought?
Oh companion, the parrot pecks at me little by little, the parrot does something to me.
In the game of love, we consume each other as sustenance. The wonder of this is found here.
In the gaze of love, the earth changes its nature. The chill of Margazhi and the coolness of Chithirai swap places here.
Your coolness soothes me repeatedly, while my heat finds comfort in your sweat.
The one who forgets love and transcends desire attains heaven.
She tied the sky's sun in her single braid and adorned her forehead with a shining star. You are the one who applied henna like the fiery mountain.
Why do you hide when you see me? Even if you go to distant mountains, I will chase after you.
If I am separated from you, where will I go? I will hide within the lines of your palm.
Oh, love has come, why is it playing hide and seek? If you find it, desire takes over.
You cut the flower and eat it, finding some peace in the reduced burden.
She tied the sky's sun in her single braid and adorned her forehead with a shining star. She is the one who applied henna like the fiery mountain.
Oh dear, you are the flag that encircled my body completely. What is your thought?
Oh companion, the parrot pecks at me little by little, the parrot does something to me.
